metadata.title: Turn 1 Blog Post Into 3 Posts Automatically (n8n + AI, No Code)
metadata.description:
Content Repurposing, AI Content Repurposing, Social Media Automation, and Content Automation are some of the most powerful ways to scale content creation. In this tutorial, you'll learn how to turn one blog post into three social media posts automatically using AI and n8n.

Content repurposing is the slowest part of being a creator, you write one good blog post, then you're stuck turning it into a LinkedIn post, an X thread, and a newsletter by hand. In this video I'll show you how to do AI content repurposing the smart way: paste one blog URL, and thirty seconds later you get three platform-ready drafts waiting in Notion. We build the whole thing from scratch with n8n and Google Gemini, no code, on the free tier.

This is a full n8n tutorial for beginners, so I explain every node as I add it. You'll set up a form trigger, scrape the article with an HTTP request, catch failed scrapes with an IF node, and then run three separate Gemini nodes, one tuned for a LinkedIn post, one for an X thread, one for a newsletter intro. That three-prompt setup is the whole reason this content automation actually sounds human instead of like one machine wrote everything.

If you've been looking for a real social media automation workflow, not auto-publishing junk, but a system with a review layer you can trust, this is it. Everything lands in Notion as a draft so you read, sharpen, and approve before anything goes out. It's the kind of automated content workflow that saves hours every week and keeps your LinkedIn, X (Twitter), and email all fed from a single article.

Perfect for creators, marketers, and anyone building a no-code AI content creation system. The exact Gemini system prompts are in the video. Like the video if it helped, and tell me which platform you're repurposing for first.

🔗 Prompt engineering course (Vanderbilt, Coursera): https://imp.i384100.net/NkOjZq

This is an affiliate link, if you sign up through it, I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. I only recommend things I'd actually use.
 
#ContentRepurposing #AIContentRepurposing #SocialMediaAutomation #ContentAutomation #n8n
